SourceProxy.name: PointCloudPinHoleProjector
SourceProxy.label: PointCloud PinHole Projector

Documentation.short_help: Project a PointCloud from a PinHole model to an image
Documentation.long_help: Project a PointCloud from a PinHole model to an image

SourceProxy.Documentation: Project a PointCloud from a PinHole model to an image

IntVectorProperty.name: Resolution
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: The image resolution. A higher resolution will give you more details, but depending on your points density, the resulting image could have empty areas.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Focal Length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The focal length. It is multiplicated by resolution width and represent the focal distance.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Camera Direction
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: A vector representing the camera direction (will be normalized).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Camera Angle
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The roll of the camera (around direction axis).

IntVectorProperty.name: UseNaN
IntVectorProperty.label: Use NaN
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If activated, use NaN when double scalars are missing for a pixel. This option doesn't affect non-double scalars, which remains initalized at 0.

IntVectorProperty.name: Fill With Neighbors
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If activated, replace NaN values by one of its 4 neighbors if one is different from NaN.
